Resort Amenities

Everything you need for a comfortable stay — and then some.

Pickleball Court

Enjoy a game on our tournament-quality pickleball court. Whether you're a seasoned player or picking up a paddle for the first time, our court is available for all guests to enjoy throughout your stay.

Putting Green

Practice your short game on our well-maintained putting green, located right at the entrance to the resort. Perfect for winding down after a day of exploring Southern Utah.

Playground

Our modern playground keeps the little ones entertained with multiple slides, climbing structures, and play areas. Located right next to the clubhouse for easy supervision.

BBQ Pavilion

Fire up the grill at our covered BBQ pavilion featuring a premium stainless steel grill station built into a beautiful stone base. Perfect for cookouts with family and fellow travelers.

Clubhouse

Our clubhouse serves as the heart of the resort — featuring a camp store with local merchandise, snacks, cold drinks, board games, and everything you might need during your stay.

Dog Park

Let your four-legged friends stretch their legs in our dedicated off-leash dog park. We're a pet-friendly resort and we want your furry companions to enjoy their stay as much as you do.

Laundry Facilities

Keep your clothes fresh with our on-site laundry facilities featuring modern washers and dryers. Conveniently located and available for all guests.

Laundry

Pavilion

Our covered outdoor pavilion provides a perfect gathering space for events, group meals, or simply relaxing in the shade while enjoying the Utah breeze and canyon views.

Pavilion

On-Site Gas Station

Fuel up without ever leaving the resort. Our on-site Sinclair gas station means you can top off your tank before hitting the road — ultimate convenience for RV travelers.

Gas Station

Clean Restrooms & Showers

Our well-maintained restroom and shower facilities are cleaned daily and available to all guests. Modern fixtures and plenty of hot water make freshening up a breeze.

Color Canyon RV Resort

Your home away from home in the heart of Southern Utah's canyon country. Full-hookup RV sites with stunning views, modern amenities, and warm hospitality.
